description: Per-session learning attestation. PRIVACY INVARIANT G6: under-18 sessions emit aggregate-only fields (sessionDuration, moduleId, completionFraction); per-learner detail fields rejected via learnerAgeBucket discriminator. 30-day rotating pseudonym DID for minors. Per ADR-2605261045.

learnerDidOrPseudonym.description: 30-day rotating pseudonym for under-18 per ADR-2605181200

encryptedDetailCid.description: Adult-only: optional encrypted detail (per-question performance, etc); FORBIDDEN for minors via cell-level validation
